---
id: transfer-the-group-ownership
title: "TransferGroupOwner"
description: "通过该接口可以将群主身份转移给群内其他成员。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>TransferGroupOwner</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以将群主身份转移给群内其他成员。

转让成功后，群内成员通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，收到相关通知：
| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupmemberinfoupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|---------|
| [OnGroupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupMemberInfoUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupmemberinfoupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">
参数 FromUserId、GroupId、NewOwner 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，''，':'，';'，'<'，'='，'.'，'>'，'?'
，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，'{'，'}'，'|'，'~'`。
</Note>
<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：1 次/秒，群级别限制。如需调整，请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=TransferGroupOwner\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["TransferGroupOwner"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"操作者用户 ID（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"current_owner"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"GroupId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"群 ID。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"group123"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"NewOwner","in":"query","required":true,"description":"新群主（接收转让的用户） ID，需为群内用户。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"new_owner"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

[全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>返回码</th><th>说明</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请检查请求参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300006</td><td>超出调用频率限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660500002</td><td>操作者用户未注册。</td><td>请先注册该用户。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群不存在。</td><td>请检查 GroupID 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600024</td><td>接受转让的用户不在群内。</td><td>请将该用户拉进群内。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
